name: Lacey Summers
description:
Popular Sweetheart/Wallflower (AKA Popular/Unpopular)

I don't know what possessed me, yall. Usually my ideas take longer to bring to life, but I had the idea for her and couldn't stop writing. I've been wanting to write a female character for a while, considering my only one before now is Odessa, but I've been so nervous for some reason? I'm really happy with Lacey, though. SO — onto the plot.

PLOT: Lacey is a social butterfly, popular at school and well loved by almost everyone. Shes rarely seen without a smile on her face and makes it her goal in life to make everyone around her happy. Despite that, she struggles with her home life and after a fight with her dad, really just wants to let loose and have fun at Graycott High's annual Halloween party.

TW: Mentions of a bad home life (absent mother, alcoholic father, verbal abuse) but other than that she should be a green flag!

[Pic has been removed per new site rules, I'm sorry yall 😭]

☆ ST CARD
creator: Bookishdoll
